en_title: Saros Developer Housemarque Wants to Have the Same Growth as FromSoftware
cn_title: 《沙罗周期》开发商望效仿From Software成功路
subtitle: 厚积薄发
opus_summary: Housemarque希望像From Software那样凭借多年积累获得成功，承认《沙罗周期》商业表现不佳，但相信游戏会随时间赢得玩家，坚持核心并教育市场。该工作室已有30年历史，将继续制作高重玩性、高难度的射击游戏。

paragraphs.en: Saros developer Housemarque is hoping to have the same trajectory as Elden Ring creator FromSoftware.
paragraphs.cn: 《沙罗周期》的开发商Housemarque希望走上与《艾尔登法环》缔造者From Software相同的发展轨迹。

paragraphs.en: In a new interview with The Game Business , the team behind Saros spoke about their ambitions for the future. They're aware that Saros hasn't met the same commercial success as other first-party PlayStation games, but believe that their games find an audience over time rather than all at once at launch.
paragraphs.cn: 在接受《The Game Business》的新采访时，《沙罗周期》背后的团队谈到了他们对未来的抱负。他们意识到《沙罗周期》尚未取得与其他PlayStation第一方游戏相同的商业成功，但他们相信自己的作品会随时间推移逐渐赢得受众，而不是在发售时就立刻爆发。

paragraphs.en: With that said, Housemarque is aware that it operates in its own niche, but has seen how that has worked for a studio like FromSoftware. Founded in 1986 and initially focussed business software, FromSoftware released its first action RPG, King's Field, back in 1994 on the original PlayStation. After two more King's Field games, the studio established the long-running mecha series Armored Core and developed a variety of other action RPGs throughout the late '90s and 2000s. However, it was 2009's Demon's Souls and the subsequent Dark Souls trilogy that would prove to be the studio's true breakout hits, setting the stage for the even more successful Bloodborne and Elden Ring. It was a slow rise to prominence, and one that meant FromSoftware didn't become a household name among gamers until decades after the studio was established.
paragraphs.cn: 话虽如此，Housemarque明白自己是在一个细分领域里运作，但也看到了这对From Software这样的工作室是如何起作用的。From Software成立于1986年，最初专注于商业软件，1994年在初代PlayStation上推出了首款动作角色扮演游戏《国王密令》。在又推出两款《国王密令》游戏后，该工作室开创了长盛不衰的机甲系列《装甲核心》，并在整个90年代末和2000年代开发了多种其他动作角色扮演游戏。然而，真正让工作室实现突破的是2009年的《恶魔之魂》以及随后的《黑暗之魂》三部曲，这为之后更成功的《血源诅咒》和《艾尔登法环》铺平了道路。这是一条缓慢崛起之路，意味着From Software在成立数十年后才成为玩家们家喻户晓的名字。

paragraphs.en: "FromSoftware [has] been doing a similar genre for a very long time and built up [its] fan base [over that period]," stated Housemarque studio head and co-founder Ilari Kuittinen. "We have two unique games out. Returnal, Saros. It's kind of a new thing that you need to educate the market about, so that people say, 'Hey, these flow states are really cool.'"
paragraphs.cn: 「From Software在很长一段时间里一直在做类似的游戏类型，并在此期间积累了粉丝基础。」Housemarque工作室负责人兼联合创始人Ilari Kuittinen表示，「我们现在有两款独特的游戏，《Returnal》和《沙罗周期》。这算是一种新事物，需要教育市场，让人们说，『嘿，这些心流体验真的很棒。』」

paragraphs.en: Housemarque isn't claiming to believe that it will match the exact same heights as FromSoftware, but hopes to have a similar trajectory in the long run.
paragraphs.cn: Housemarque并非声称自己将能达到与From Software完全相同的高度，但希望在长远来看能走上类似的上升轨迹。

paragraphs.en: "FromSoftware's journey from King's Field to what [it is] today… We're not presuming that we would be anywhere close to that," Kuittinen continued. "But, [like FromSoftware], we will keep our core, keep educating the market that these are the coolest games you can play. That's our goal."
paragraphs.cn: 「From Software从《国王密令》到今天的历程……我们不敢奢望能接近那样的成就。」Kuittinen继续说道，「但就像From Software那样，我们会坚守自己的核心，继续教育市场，让大家知道这些是你能玩到的最酷的游戏。这就是我们的目标。」

paragraphs.en: Housemarque has been around for 30 years now, but really only began to find its voice as a studio in 2013 when it developed Resogun. Since then, the team has been focusing on fast-paced, intense shooters that have largely been showered in critical praise. The success of the studio's first PS5 game, Returnal, even led to PlayStation acquiring Housemarque in 2021 .
paragraphs.cn: Housemarque已成立三十年，但直到2013年开发《Resogun》才真正找到了作为工作室的自我定位。从那以后，团队便专注于快节奏、高强度的射击游戏，这些作品大多收获了评论界的一致好评。工作室首款PS5游戏《Returnal》的成功，甚至让PlayStation在2021年直接收购了Housemarque。

paragraphs.en: While it remains to be seen what's next for Housemarque, it does seem like it will continue to lean into its strengths by making highly replayable and difficult shooters.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然Housemarque的下一步动向仍待揭晓，但看起来它会继续发挥自身优势，制作那些高度可重玩且难度不低的射击游戏。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，报道范围涵盖游戏、电影等所有娱乐内容。你可以在Twitter上找到他 @Cade_Onder。
